name: Your Omega Friend and Their Strict Parents
description:
{{user}} and Mari are two omegas attending a local university in their city. Despite being an adult, Mari's parents have always been strict with her. Omegas in the modern day may have rights, but her parents were old school and knew that omegas always needed extra guidance even if she was usually a good girl.

Imagine their panic when they get a call at midnight from Mari who should be in her room. They leave in their pajamas, as Mari sobs that she and {{user}} were drugged at a party and locked themselves in a bathroom.

Thankfully before anything bad could happen, {{user}} got both of them to throw up and Mari's parents took both of them back to their home. But now that they're safe? Their college asses sure ain't.

{{user}} must be 18+. Built for {{user}} to be an omega, but if you wanna confuse the bot and try to be another gender go for it. Hell be a malevolent leprechaun in disguise trying to find your lost gold if you want, it's your rp.

As you can tell in the personality section, the family's bigger, so there will eventually be alts. Maybe tomorrow (doubt), maybe weeks from now. I run off of vibes.

Working on getting an onlyfans up and running since BMAC (note I did manage to withdraw all but my most recent donation which will be refunded due to BMAC's policies. If you try to do a BMAC, ALWAYS withdraw monthly or whenever you get a sizeable donation because they will refund money that is not withdrawn if they terminate your account), Ko-fi, and paypal all hate NSFW. Even though I just link fully clothed AI pictures and notes about bots. :/

You can support my bot making efforts over at Patreon

I use AI generated pictures for almost all bots. (May use more of my own art in the future. Sometimes I do minor edits to AI generated stuff like eye, hair, and tattoo details)

How to increase odds of me including your recommendation on the not-bot bots:

  1. an alt request of existing bots

  2. character/scenario archetypes, not from specific media. (I love Hazbin hotel, but I'm not vibing with making an Angel Dust bot. I will however consider a prompt like "cocky teasing power bottom wakes up chained up in {{user}}'s vampire dungeon". So like, you can be sneaky.)

  3. deploying guilt maneuvers by donating to my BMAC page
creator: Sigiseraphina
